summaries.theme_name: App Performance and Customer Support Issues
actionable_ideas: Prioritize bug fixes and performance optimization to reduce glitches and improve user experience
Enhance customer support by providing timely and personalized responses to user queries and concerns
Simplify the IPO application and tracking process to reduce user frustration
